checks.purpose: Tau runs a tau.dag_contract.v1 creator-reviewer DAG, executes real local subprocess workers, and records a reviewer verdict against the immutable goal.
Tau runs a YAML tau.dag_contract.v1 creator-reviewer DAG through the same non-mocked local subprocess handoff path.
Tau runs a DAG-level creator-reviewer repair loop where reviewer returns REVISE once, creator reruns, and reviewer then returns PASS.
Tau runs a bounded ready-queue project DAG with concurrent researcher/coder branches and a reviewer join against the immutable goal.
Tau retries a timed-out concurrent ready-queue DAG node, preserves the failed attempt evidence, and continues to the reviewer join after the retry passes.
Tau retries a concurrent ready-queue DAG node that emits non-JSON once, then continues to the reviewer join after a valid retry response.
